sentences.arabic: كَانَ شَيْخٌ كَبِيرٌ يَمْشِي بِبُطْءٍ فِي الشَّارِعِ.
sentences.translationEn: An old man was walking slowly in the street.

sentences.translation: Nosio je tešku torbu i bio je jako umoran.
sentences.translationEn: He was carrying a heavy bag and was very tired.

sentences.arabic: رَأَتْهُ طِفْلَةٌ اسْمُهَا نُورٌ فَرَكَضَتْ إِلَيْهِ.
sentences.translation: Vidjela ga je djevojčica po imenu Nur pa je potrčala prema njemu.
sentences.translationEn: A girl named Nour saw him and ran to him.

sentences.arabic: حَمَلَتِ الْحَقِيبَةَ مَعَهُ حَتَّى وَصَلَا إِلَى بَيْتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Ponijela je torbu s njim sve dok nisu stigli do njegove kuće.
sentences.translationEn: She carried the bag with him until they reached his house.

sentences.arabic: شَكَرَهَا الشَّيْخُ وَقَالَ لَهَا: «أَنْتِ طِفْلَةٌ طَيِّبَةُ الْقَلْبِ».
sentences.translation: Starac joj se zahvalio i rekao joj: «Ti si djevojčica dobrog srca».
sentences.translationEn: The old man thanked her and said: «You are a kind-hearted girl».
